warnings: Sum of Fukui function for electrophilic attack (f+) = 1.0000 (should be approximately 1.0; large drift suggests an N¹ state did not converge)
Sum of Fukui function for nucleophilic attack (f−) = 1.0000 (should be approximately 1.0; large drift suggests an N¹ state did not converge)

prose: The Fukui reactivity calculation on pyridine using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set in the gas phase was successful. The method used was B3LYP/def2-TZVP at the 'standard' tier level. The calculation indicates the most electrophilic site is the nitrogen atom, while the most nucleophilic site is the targeted carbon atom; the plot of the reactivity descriptors is available at the provided path. Warnings: Sum of Fukui function for electrophilic attack (f+) = 1.0000 (should be approximately 1.0; large drift suggests an N¹ state did not converge). Sum of Fukui function for nucleophilic attack (f−) = 1.0000 (should be approximately 1.0; large drift suggests an N¹ state did not converge). Schema header present.
